oracleNotes.A-LANG: independent: expected node/edge sets authored by hand per fixture
oracleNotes.A-SELFCONTAINED: independent: from-scratch regex network-ref scan over shipped report.html
oracleNotes.A-TREEMAP: independent: pure geometry invariants over the shipped bisect() extracted from the template
oracleNotes.A-CIGATE: independent: git ground truth we construct (known regression/clean/removal states)
oracleNotes.A-TREND: independent: we plant the duplicate-logic overlaps; true confirmed sequence known
oracleNotes.A-PLACE: independent: plurality-domain recomputed inline from graph (not placement.mjs)
oracleNotes.A-FIT: independent: per-rule violating set recomputed inline with plain edge/degree filters
oracleNotes.A-RISK: independent: risk formula re-implemented here with own weights; CLI ranking cross-checked
oracleNotes.A-HOT: independent: 0.5cx+0.3fanIn+0.2churn re-implemented here with own weights vs shipped score
oracleNotes.A-SUPP: independent: we control the orphan + identity; expected hide/resurface is known
oracleNotes.A-MCP: cross-INTERFACE parity (MCP vs CLI, same input) + protocol conformance — NOT an external oracle; underlying correctness covered by C1-C5

perHypothesis.metric: languages with exact node-set & no-fabricated-edge extraction
perHypothesis.criterion: all 5 langs: expected nodes == extracted (no missed/spurious defs), call edges ⊆ real calls; probe trips

perHypothesis.metric: external network references in shipped report.html
perHypothesis.criterion: zero external http(s)/CDN refs on synthetic+real reports; detector trips on a doctored page

perHypothesis.metric: adversarial treemap cases terminating + tiling exactly
perHypothesis.criterion: dominant/all-zero/large-uniform/random all terminate, rect-count==item-count, in-bounds, area exact; probe trips
regression->1 (names why), clean->0, pure-removal->0; opposite-direction cases both observed
tool sequence == planted [0,1,2,3,4] AND monotone non-decreasing; probe rejects a non-monotone series
100% agreement over T=200 random graphs; probe confirms a wrong claim would be caught

perHypothesis.metric: recall on injected violations / false flags on clean
perHypothesis.criterion: recall == 1.0 on injected (forbidden/layer/cycle/fanin/loc); 0 false flags on clean; both directions observed

perHypothesis.ci: RuleOfThree 95% upper bound on violation rate <= 0.0003
perHypothesis.criterion: 0 monotonicity violations over T=2000 vectors (all 5 inputs); shipped CLI ranking == independent formula; probe trips
0 mismatches within 1e-9 over T=60 random graphs; probe separates a wrong formula
suppressed finding hidden+counted; --show-suppressed reveals; renamed id resurfaces (suppressed->0)

perHypothesis.metric: tools at CLI parity / protocol conformance
perHypothesis.criterion: all 26 parity tools == CLI on same input (codeweb_map covered by mcp.test.mjs); initialize/tools.list/tools.call + error codes (-32602/-32601/-32700, isError) conform; probe trips
